name: zrndr_span_occlusion_build_column_table
description: zRndr::SpanOcclusionBuildColumnHeadTable clears per-column span heads, resets allocation cursors, and rebuilds saved occluder polygons.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SpanOcclusionBuildColumnHeadTable@zRndr@@YAXXZ at 0x490590 still fails: 53 unmasked mismatches, 44 relocation bytes masked, 11 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 99 bytes, VC object symbol size 112 bytes.

Reviewed difference is source-shape drift in the column-head clear loop, cursor reset scheduling, and saved-occluder iteration register allocation. The native smokes cover init/build state, table clearing, cursor setup, saved occluder rasterization, and downstream rasterizer behavior.
